rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Ericsson, Inc'S Further Responses To Written Discovery; And To Compel Deposition Of Deft'S Person Most Qualified Custodian Of Records; Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 17, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Ericsson, Inc.¿s further responses to written discovery and PMK deposition and request for sanctions was continued from February 16 pursuant to plaintiffs¿ counsel¿s request. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on May 16 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain and then appear at the hearing on May 17. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES E. OWENS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Henkel Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Produce Document And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 17, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Henkel Corporation¿s motion to compel plaintiff to produce documents is granted in part. Based on the representation of Ms. Onge that the court reporting firm no longer has a transcript of the 2002 Tanovich deposition, plaintiff is required to produce a copy of that deposition to defendant within two days. The parties are ordered to make every reasonable effort to determine whether Aiken & Welch has a transcript of the 1995 Eisner deposition. If Aiken & Welch is unable to state that it does by 5pm on Friday May 20, then plaintiff is required to produce a copy of that deposition to defendant by 5pm on May 24. All requests for sanctions are denied. = (220/HEK)

Defendant Bragg Investment Company, Inc.¿s joinder to Ford Motor Company¿s motion to exclude testimony of plaintiff James Sherfy, or in the alternative, compel plaintiff James Sherfy to attend his deposition is off calendar as moot based on plaintiffs¿ representation that Mr. Sherfy appeared at his April 25 deposition. = (220/HEK)
